title: Animals That Can Regenerate!

scenes.text: Did you know some animals can regrow entire limbs?
Axolotls can regenerate limbs, heart, and even parts of their brain!
Starfish can regenerate lost arms and even grow a new central disk.
Some lizards can regrow their tails too!
scenes.label: TAIL REGENERATION

scenes.text: Follow so you never run out of fun facts.

description: Some animals can regenerate limbs or even organs! Discover the wonders of nature! Follow for daily facts!
